archetypeLinks.label: feeds
archetypeLinks.notes: Battery characters gain value when the rest of the team can spend the meter they build.

archetypeLinks.label: creates
archetypeLinks.notes: Stable neutral wins give the team more chances to build meter, call assists safely, and choose when to cash out.

archetypeLinks.label: enables
archetypeLinks.notes: Long blockstun and predictable screen control make layered offense easier to run.

archetypeLinks.label: sets up
archetypeLinks.notes: Teams that move the opponent to the corner can turn knockdowns and supers into stronger follow-up pressure.

archetypeLinks.label: converts into
archetypeLinks.notes: Good DHC paths let the team turn a starter into the character with the best remaining reward.
